feed.title: powerlift.ing Blog
feed.subtitle: Powerlifting programming, the builder, and shareable programs

entry.title: Programming With %1RM and RPE on the Same Row
entry.summary: Use estimated maxes to fill load from percentages, or log RPE when percentages drift. Both fit in one row.

entry.title: Getting Started With the Program Builder
entry.summary: A quick walkthrough of mesocycles, weeks, days, and rows so you can ship your first shareable powerlifting plan.

entry.title: How Sharing Works on powerlift.ing
entry.summary: Your whole program lives in the URL. Here is what that means for privacy, updates, and sending plans to athletes.
